aa_swap: The amino acid change caused by this variant
alphamissense_c: AI-predicted pathogenicity score for missense variants
blosum62_c: Evolutionary substitution score between amino acids
charge_altering: Whether the substitution changes amino acid charge
chipseq_h3k27ac_breadth: H3K27ac active enhancer/promoter mark across tissues
chipseq_h3k27me3_breadth: H3K27me3 Polycomb repressive mark across tissues
chipseq_h3k36me3_breadth: H3K36me3 active transcription mark across tissues
chipseq_h3k4me3_breadth: H3K4me3 active promoter mark across tissues
consequence: Molecular effect of the variant on the transcript
disorder_content_fraction: Proportion of the protein that is intrinsically disordered
eve_c: Evolutionary model score for variant pathogenicity
fstack_is_quiescent: Chromatin state: region with no active histone marks across tissues
gerp_c: Evolutionary conservation score at this genomic position
grantham_c: Physicochemical difference between substituted amino acids
hydrophobicity_c: Change in amino acid hydrophobicity caused by substitution
impact: Predicted severity of the variant's functional effect
in_chain: Whether the position falls within a protein chain
in_dna_binding: Whether the position is in a DNA-binding region
in_interpro_domain: Whether the position falls within an annotated protein domain
interpro_GPCR_rhodopsin_like_7TM: G protein-coupled receptor with seven transmembrane helices
interpro_Homedomain_like_superfamily: Homeodomain superfamily involved in DNA binding
interpro_Intermediate_filament_rod_domai: Structural rod domain of intermediate filament proteins

interpro_Krueppel_associated_box_domain_: Superfamily of KRAB transcriptional repressor domains
interpro_Nebulin_repeat: Actin-binding repeat domain found in nebulin proteins
interpro_Olduvai_domain: Protein domain associated with human brain evolution
interpro_Olfactory_receptor: Receptor domain that detects odor molecules
interpro_Regulator_of_chromosome_condens: Domain regulating chromosome condensation and nuclear transport
interpro_Serine_proteases_trypsin_domain: Catalytic domain of trypsin-like serine proteases

interpro_Sushi_SCR_CCP_domain: Complement control protein domain involved in immune regulation
interpro_Zinc_finger_C2H2_superfamily: Superfamily of C2H2 zinc finger DNA-binding proteins
interpro_Zinc_finger_C2H2_type: Classic C2H2-type zinc finger DNA-binding domain
is_alu: Whether the position falls within an Alu repeat element
is_cpg_island: Whether the position falls within a CpG island
is_disordered: Whether the position is in an intrinsically disordered region
is_low_plddt: Whether AlphaFold predicts low structural confidence here
is_polypyrimidine_tract: Whether the position is in a polypyrimidine splicing tract
is_ppi_interface: Whether the position is at a protein-protein interaction interface
is_ptc_region: Whether variant could create a premature termination codon (PTC)
mw_c: Change in molecular weight caused by amino acid substitution

phastcons_100way: Evolutionary conservation score across 100 vertebrate species
phylop_100way: Per-site evolutionary conservation across 100 vertebrate species
plddt: AlphaFold's confidence in predicted local protein structure
polyphen_c: Predicted functional impact of amino acid substitution
psi: Protein backbone psi dihedral angle from AlphaFold structure
ptm_glycosylation: Known site of sugar molecule attachment to protein
ptm_phosphorylation: Known site of phosphate group addition to protein
region_CDS: Variant falls within a protein-coding sequence region
region_intron: Variant falls within a non-coding intron region
revel_c: Ensemble score predicting pathogenicity of missense variants
rsa: Proportion of amino acid surface exposed to solvent
sasa: Total solvent-accessible surface area of an amino acid
secondary_structure_H: Whether the residue lies within an alpha helix
segdup_identity: Sequence similarity of overlapping segmental duplication regions
sift_c: Predicted effect of amino acid change on protein function
splice_disrupting: Whether the variant is predicted to disrupt splicing
spliceai_max_c: Deep learning prediction of variant impact on splicing
trf_copy_number: Number of repeated units in a tandem repeat region
trf_period: Length of the repeating unit in a tandem repeat
volume_c: Amino acid side chain volume at this position
